name: firm-research
description: Primary-source research and diligence workflows. Verify disclosures against the record, reconstruct real economics from free public data, and map corporate relationships. Free out of the box; optional keys unlock premium coverage.

sec_user_agent.title: SEC EDGAR User-Agent
sec_user_agent.description: Required by the SEC fair-access policy on every data.sec.gov request. Format: 'Name email@domain'.

opencorporates_api_key.title: OpenCorporates API key (optional)
opencorporates_api_key.description: OPTIONAL PLUG-IN SLOT. Leave blank and registry-graph runs on free sources only (SEC, US state Secretary of State portals, UK Companies House, ICIJ Offshore Leaks). Add a key to enable cross-jurisdiction officer and entity resolution at scale.

trade_data_api_key.title: Trade-data / bill-of-lading API key (optional)
trade_data_api_key.description: OPTIONAL PLUG-IN SLOT. Provider-agnostic (ImportGenius, Panjiva, Tradesparq, Tradeindata). Leave blank and customs-reconstruct falls back to free Census USA Trade Online aggregates. Add a key for shipment-level bill-of-lading records.

trade_data_provider.title: Trade-data provider name (optional)
trade_data_provider.description: OPTIONAL. Names the vendor that trade_data_api_key belongs to, so customs-reconstruct calls the right endpoint.

firm_research_db_url.title: Internal research database URL (optional)
firm_research_db_url.description: OPTIONAL PLUG-IN SLOT. Point at an in-house data service to let skills reconcile findings against the Firm's own records.
